title: Tad Is Missing
bodyText:
Tad's abandoned camp + warhammer (S12); [[roots-journal]]: "No word from Tad." — sent to solve the vines "by whatever means necessary."

> [!dm] [[kennarea|Kena]]'s unplayed key point: **she HAS Tad.** Never surfaced at the table. With [[root-darkpass|Root]] dead, Tad is the Darkpass heir — and a hostage nobody knows about.
